---
title: "Features"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-13"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
text <- "In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth."

char_ngrams <- function(text, n){

  # lowercase
  text <- tolower(text)

  # remove punctuation
  text <- gsub("[^a-z ]", "", text)

  # collapse multiple spaces
  text <- gsub("\\s+", " ", text)

  chars <- strsplit(text, "")[[1]]

  grams <- sapply(
    1:(length(chars) - n + 1),
    function(i){
      paste(chars[i:(i+n-1)], collapse="")
    }
  )

  table(grams)
}

char3 <- char_ngrams(text, 3)

head(sort(char3, decreasing=TRUE), 10)

char3_freq <- prop.table(char3)

head(sort(char3_freq, decreasing=TRUE), 10)


char4 <- char_ngrams(text, 4)

head(sort(char4, decreasing=TRUE), 10)


char5 <- char_ngrams(text, 5)

head(sort(char5, decreasing=TRUE), 10)


```
```{r}
docs <- c(
  isa1  = "The vision of Isaiah the son of Amoz.",
  isa2  = "And it shall come to pass in the last days.",
  isa40 = "Comfort ye, comfort ye my people."
)

char_tfidf <- function(docs, n){

  grams_by_doc <- lapply(docs, char_ngrams, n = n)

  vocab <- sort(unique(unlist(grams_by_doc)))

  tf <- matrix(
    0,
    nrow = length(docs),
    ncol = length(vocab),
    dimnames = list(names(docs), vocab)
  )

  for(i in seq_along(grams_by_doc)){
    tab <- table(grams_by_doc[[i]])
    tf[i, names(tab)] <- as.numeric(tab)
  }

  # document-length normalization
  tf <- tf / rowSums(tf)

  # document frequency
  df <- colSums(tf > 0)

  # smoothed IDF
  N <- nrow(tf)
  idf <- log((N + 1) / (df + 1)) + 1

  tfidf <- sweep(tf, 2, idf, `*`)

  return(tfidf)
}



char3_tfidf <- char_tfidf(docs, 3)
char4_tfidf <- char_tfidf(docs, 4)
char5_tfidf <- char_tfidf(docs, 5)



top_features <- function(mat, doc, k = 10){
  sort(mat[doc, ], decreasing = TRUE)[1:k]
}

top_features(char3_tfidf, "isa40", 10)
top_features(char4_tfidf, "isa40", 10)
top_features(char5_tfidf, "isa40", 10)




cosine_sim <- function(mat){
  mat_norm <- mat / sqrt(rowSums(mat^2))
  mat_norm %*% t(mat_norm)
}

char3_cosine <- cosine_sim(char3_tfidf)
char4_cosine <- cosine_sim(char4_tfidf)
char5_cosine <- cosine_sim(char5_tfidf)






```




```{r n-grams words}
library(SnowballC)

docs <- c(
  isa1  = "The vision of Isaiah the son of Amoz.",
  isa2  = "And it shall come to pass in the last days.",
  isa40 = "Comfort ye, comfort ye my people."
)



tokenize_text <- function(text, stem = FALSE){
  text <- tolower(text)
  text <- gsub("[^a-z ]", " ", text)
  text <- gsub("\\s+", " ", text)
  text <- trimws(text)

  words <- unlist(strsplit(text, " "))
  words <- words[words != ""]

  if(stem)
    words <- wordStem(words, language = "en")

  words
}

word_ngrams <- function(text, n = 1, stem = FALSE){
  words <- tokenize_text(text, stem = stem)

  if(length(words) < n)
    return(character(0))

  sapply(
    1:(length(words) - n + 1),
    function(i) paste(words[i:(i+n-1)], collapse = "_")
  )
}


ngram_tfidf <- function(docs, n = 1, stem = FALSE){

  grams <- lapply(docs, word_ngrams, n = n, stem = stem)

  vocab <- sort(unique(unlist(grams)))

  tf <- matrix(
    0,
    nrow = length(docs),
    ncol = length(vocab),
    dimnames = list(names(docs), vocab)
  )

  for(i in seq_along(grams)){
    tab <- table(grams[[i]])
    tf[i, names(tab)] <- as.numeric(tab)
  }

  tf <- tf / rowSums(tf)

  df <- colSums(tf > 0)
  N <- nrow(tf)

  idf <- log((N + 1) / (df + 1)) + 1

  sweep(tf, 2, idf, "*")
}


word1_tfidf <- ngram_tfidf(docs, n = 1, stem = FALSE)
word2_tfidf <- ngram_tfidf(docs, n = 2, stem = FALSE)
word3_tfidf <- ngram_tfidf(docs, n = 3, stem = FALSE)

stem1_tfidf <- ngram_tfidf(docs, n = 1, stem = TRUE)
stem2_tfidf <- ngram_tfidf(docs, n = 2, stem = TRUE)
stem3_tfidf <- ngram_tfidf(docs, n = 3, stem = TRUE)


round(word1_tfidf, 3)
round(word2_tfidf, 3)
round(word3_tfidf, 3)


top_features <- function(mat, doc, k = 10){
  sort(mat[doc, ], decreasing = TRUE)[1:k]
}

top_features(word1_tfidf, "isa1", 10)
top_features(word1_tfidf, "isa2", 10)
top_features(word1_tfidf, "isa40", 10)

top_features(word2_tfidf, "isa40", 10)
top_features(word3_tfidf, "isa40", 10)



cosine_sim <- function(mat){
  norm <- sqrt(rowSums(mat^2))
  mat2 <- mat / norm
  mat2 %*% t(mat2)
}

round(cosine_sim(word1_tfidf), 3)
round(cosine_sim(word2_tfidf), 3)
round(cosine_sim(word3_tfidf), 3)

round(cosine_sim(stem1_tfidf), 3)
round(cosine_sim(stem2_tfidf), 3)
round(cosine_sim(stem3_tfidf), 3)







```




```{r features}
feature_sets <- list(
  word1 = ngram_tfidf(docs, n = 1, stem = FALSE),
  word2 = ngram_tfidf(docs, n = 2, stem = FALSE),
  word3 = ngram_tfidf(docs, n = 3, stem = FALSE),

  stem1 = ngram_tfidf(docs, n = 1, stem = TRUE),
  stem2 = ngram_tfidf(docs, n = 2, stem = TRUE),
  stem3 = ngram_tfidf(docs, n = 3, stem = TRUE)
)

cosine_scores <- lapply(feature_sets, cosine_sim)


names(feature_sets)
names(cosine_scores)

round(cosine_scores$word1, 3)
round(cosine_scores$word2, 3)
round(cosine_scores$stem1, 3)




```

```{r function-word-sets}

docs <- c(
  isa1  = "The vision of Isaiah the son of Amoz.",
  isa2  = "And it shall come to pass in the last days.",
  isa40 = "Comfort ye, comfort ye my people."
)


function_word_sets <- list(

  basic = c(
    "the","and","of","to","in","that","which","shall",
    "unto","ye","he","his","it","for","with","by"
  ),

  kjv = c(
    "the","and","of","to","in","that","which","shall",
    "unto","ye","thou","thee","thy","thine",
    "hath","doth","saith","yea","nay","verily"
  ),

  pronouns = c(
    "i","me","my","mine",
    "thou","thee","thy","thine",
    "he","him","his",
    "she","her",
    "we","us","our",
    "ye","you","your",
    "they","them","their"
  ),

  conjunctions = c(
    "and","but","or","nor","for","yet","so",
    "if","though","although","because","therefore",
    "wherefore","whereas"
  ),

  prepositions = c(
    "of","to","in","unto","by","with","from","for",
    "on","upon","at","into","through","over","under",
    "before","after","against","among","between"
  ),

  auxiliaries = c(
    "shall","will","would","should","may","might",
    "can","could","must",
    "is","are","was","were","be","being","been",
    "hath","has","had","doth","does","did"
  )

)



tokenize_text <- function(text){
  text <- tolower(text)
  text <- gsub("[^a-z ]", " ", text)
  text <- gsub("\\s+", " ", text)
  text <- trimws(text)

  words <- unlist(strsplit(text, " "))
  words[words != ""]
}

function_word_freq <- function(docs, vocab){

  mat <- matrix(
    0,
    nrow = length(docs),
    ncol = length(vocab),
    dimnames = list(names(docs), vocab)
  )

  for(i in seq_along(docs)){
    words <- tokenize_text(docs[i])
    tab <- table(words)

    common <- intersect(names(tab), vocab)

    mat[i, common] <- as.numeric(tab[common])
    mat[i, ] <- mat[i, ] / length(words)
  }

  mat
}



function_word_tfidf <- function(docs, vocab){

  grams_by_doc <- lapply(docs, tokenize_text)

  vocab <- sort(unique(vocab))

  tf <- matrix(
    0,
    nrow = length(docs),
    ncol = length(vocab),
    dimnames = list(names(docs), vocab)
  )

  for(i in seq_along(grams_by_doc)){
    words <- grams_by_doc[[i]]
    tab <- table(words)

    common <- intersect(names(tab), vocab)

    tf[i, common] <- as.numeric(tab[common])
  }

  tf <- tf / rowSums(tf)

  df <- colSums(tf > 0)
  N <- nrow(tf)

  idf <- log((N + 1) / (df + 1)) + 1

  sweep(tf, 2, idf, "*")
}

top_features <- function(mat, doc, k = 10){
  sort(mat[doc, ], decreasing = TRUE)[1:k]
}


cosine_sim <- function(mat){

  norm <- sqrt(rowSums(mat^2))

  mat2 <- mat / norm

  mat2 %*% t(mat2)
}


fw_freq_features <- lapply(
  function_word_sets,
  function(vocab){
    function_word_freq(docs, vocab)
  }
)

names(fw_freq_features) <- paste0(
  "fw_freq_",
  names(function_word_sets)
)


fw_tfidf_features <- lapply(
  function_word_sets,
  function(vocab){
    function_word_tfidf(docs, vocab)
  }
)

names(fw_tfidf_features) <- paste0(
  "fw_tfidf_",
  names(function_word_sets)
)

fw_freq_cosines <- lapply(fw_freq_features, cosine_sim)
fw_tfidf_cosines <- lapply(fw_tfidf_features, cosine_sim)


round(fw_freq_features$fw_freq_basic, 3)
round(fw_tfidf_features$fw_tfidf_basic, 3)

top_features(fw_freq_features$fw_freq_kjv, "isa2", 10)
top_features(fw_tfidf_features$fw_tfidf_kjv, "isa2", 10)

round(fw_freq_cosines$fw_freq_basic, 3)
round(fw_tfidf_cosines$fw_tfidf_basic, 3)


feature_sets <- c(
  fw_freq_features,
  fw_tfidf_features
)

cosine_scores <- c(
  fw_freq_cosines,
  fw_tfidf_cosines
)






```
```{r pos 3,4,5}
library(udpipe)

docs <- c(
  isa1  = "The vision of Isaiah the son of Amoz.",
  isa2  = "And it shall come to pass in the last days.",
  isa40 = "Comfort ye, comfort ye my people."
)

# Download once if needed
model_file <- "english-ewt-ud-2.5-191206.udpipe"

if(!file.exists(model_file)){
  ud_model_info <- udpipe_download_model(language = "english")
  model_file <- ud_model_info$file_model
}

ud_model <- udpipe_load_model(model_file)

# IMPORTANT: preserve document names
anno <- udpipe_annotate(
  ud_model,
  x = docs,
  doc_id = names(docs)
)

anno <- as.data.frame(anno)

# POS n-gram function
pos_ngrams <- function(pos, n){
  pos <- pos[!is.na(pos)]

  if(length(pos) < n)
    return(character(0))

  sapply(
    1:(length(pos) - n + 1),
    function(i){
      paste(pos[i:(i+n-1)], collapse = "_")
    }
  )
}

# TF-IDF matrix
tfidf_matrix <- function(grams_by_doc){

  vocab <- sort(unique(unlist(grams_by_doc)))

  mat <- matrix(
    0,
    nrow = length(grams_by_doc),
    ncol = length(vocab),
    dimnames = list(names(grams_by_doc), vocab)
  )

  for(i in seq_along(grams_by_doc)){
    tab <- table(grams_by_doc[[i]])
    mat[i, names(tab)] <- as.numeric(tab)
  }

  tf <- mat / rowSums(mat)

  df <- colSums(tf > 0)
  N <- nrow(tf)

  idf <- log((N + 1) / (df + 1)) + 1

  sweep(tf, 2, idf, "*")
}

# Top features
top_features <- function(mat, doc, k = 10){

  if(!doc %in% rownames(mat)){
    stop(
      paste0(
        "Document '", doc, "' not found. Available docs: ",
        paste(rownames(mat), collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }

  sort(mat[doc, ], decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(k, ncol(mat))]
}

# Cosine similarity
cosine_sim <- function(mat){

  norm <- sqrt(rowSums(mat^2))

  mat2 <- mat / norm

  mat2 %*% t(mat2)
}

# Build POS sequences by document
pos_by_doc <- split(
  anno$upos,
  anno$doc_id
)

# Build POS 3, 4, 5 n-grams
pos3 <- lapply(pos_by_doc, pos_ngrams, n = 3)
pos4 <- lapply(pos_by_doc, pos_ngrams, n = 4)
pos5 <- lapply(pos_by_doc, pos_ngrams, n = 5)

# Build TF-IDF matrices
pos3_tfidf <- tfidf_matrix(pos3)
pos4_tfidf <- tfidf_matrix(pos4)
pos5_tfidf <- tfidf_matrix(pos5)

# View TF-IDF matrices
round(pos3_tfidf, 3)
round(pos4_tfidf, 3)
round(pos5_tfidf, 3)

# Top POS features
top_features(pos3_tfidf, "isa1", 10)
top_features(pos4_tfidf, "isa1", 10)
top_features(pos5_tfidf, "isa1", 10)

top_features(pos3_tfidf, "isa2", 10)
top_features(pos4_tfidf, "isa2", 10)
top_features(pos5_tfidf, "isa2", 10)

top_features(pos3_tfidf, "isa40", 10)
top_features(pos4_tfidf, "isa40", 10)
top_features(pos5_tfidf, "isa40", 10)

# Cosine similarity matrices
pos3_cosine <- cosine_sim(pos3_tfidf)
pos4_cosine <- cosine_sim(pos4_tfidf)
pos5_cosine <- cosine_sim(pos5_tfidf)

round(pos3_cosine, 3)
round(pos4_cosine, 3)
round(pos5_cosine, 3)

# Feature-set object
pos_features <- list(
  pos3_tfidf = pos3_tfidf,
  pos4_tfidf = pos4_tfidf,
  pos5_tfidf = pos5_tfidf
)

pos_cosines <- lapply(pos_features, cosine_sim)



```

```{r punctuation}
docs <- c(
  isa1  = "The vision of Isaiah the son of Amoz.",
  isa2  = "And it shall come to pass in the last days.",
  isa40 = "Comfort ye, comfort ye my people."
)

tokenize_text <- function(text){
  text <- tolower(text)
  text <- gsub("[^a-z ]", " ", text)
  text <- gsub("\\s+", " ", text)
  text <- trimws(text)

  words <- unlist(strsplit(text, " "))
  words[words != ""]
}


punctuation_features <- function(docs){

  mat <- matrix(
    0,
    nrow = length(docs),
    ncol = 6,
    dimnames = list(
      names(docs),
      c(
        "comma_per_word",
        "semicolon_per_word",
        "colon_per_word",
        "quote_per_word",
        "period_per_word",
        "punct_total_per_word"
      )
    )
  )

  for(i in seq_along(docs)){

    text <- docs[i]
    words <- tokenize_text(text)
    n_words <- length(words)

    comma <- gregexpr(",", text)[[1]]
    semicolon <- gregexpr(";", text)[[1]]
    colon <- gregexpr(":", text)[[1]]
    quote <- gregexpr("[\"'“”‘’]", text)[[1]]
    period <- gregexpr("\\.", text)[[1]]

    comma_n <- ifelse(comma[1] == -1, 0, length(comma))
    semicolon_n <- ifelse(semicolon[1] == -1, 0, length(semicolon))
    colon_n <- ifelse(colon[1] == -1, 0, length(colon))
    quote_n <- ifelse(quote[1] == -1, 0, length(quote))
    period_n <- ifelse(period[1] == -1, 0, length(period))

    total_n <- comma_n + semicolon_n + colon_n + quote_n + period_n

    mat[i, ] <- c(
      comma_n / n_words,
      semicolon_n / n_words,
      colon_n / n_words,
      quote_n / n_words,
      period_n / n_words,
      total_n / n_words
    )
  }

  mat
}

punct_features <- punctuation_features(docs)

round(punct_features, 3)


cosine_sim <- function(mat){

  norm <- sqrt(rowSums(mat^2))

  mat2 <- mat / norm

  mat2 %*% t(mat2)
}


punct_cosine <- cosine_sim(punct_features)

round(punct_cosine, 3)

top_features <- function(mat, doc, k = 10){

  if(!doc %in% rownames(mat)){
    stop(
      paste0(
        "Document '", doc, "' not found. Available docs: ",
        paste(rownames(mat), collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }

  sort(mat[doc, ], decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(k, ncol(mat))]
}


top_features(punct_features, "isa1")
top_features(punct_features, "isa2")
top_features(punct_features, "isa40")

feature_sets <- list(
  punctuation_freq = punct_features
)

cosine_scores <- list(
  punctuation_freq = punct_cosine
)





```

```{r sentence length}
docs <- c(
  isa1  = "The vision of Isaiah the son of Amoz.",
  isa2  = "And it shall come to pass in the last days.",
  isa40 = "Comfort ye, comfort ye my people."
)


tokenize_text <- function(text){
  text <- tolower(text)
  text <- gsub("[^a-z ]", " ", text)
  text <- gsub("\\s+", " ", text)
  text <- trimws(text)

  words <- unlist(strsplit(text, " "))
  words[words != ""]
}

sentence_length_bins <- function(docs){

  bins <- c(
    "sent_lt10",
    "sent_10_19",
    "sent_20_29",
    "sent_30_39",
    "sent_ge40"
  )

  mat <- matrix(
    0,
    nrow = length(docs),
    ncol = length(bins),
    dimnames = list(names(docs), bins)
  )

  for(i in seq_along(docs)){

    sents <- unlist(strsplit(docs[i], "[.!?]+"))
    sents <- trimws(sents)
    sents <- sents[sents != ""]

    lens <- sapply(sents, function(s){
      length(tokenize_text(s))
    })

    mat[i, "sent_lt10"]  <- mean(lens < 10)
    mat[i, "sent_10_19"] <- mean(lens >= 10 & lens < 20)
    mat[i, "sent_20_29"] <- mean(lens >= 20 & lens < 30)
    mat[i, "sent_30_39"] <- mean(lens >= 30 & lens < 40)
    mat[i, "sent_ge40"]  <- mean(lens >= 40)
  }

  mat
}

sent_freq <- sentence_length_bins(docs)

round(sent_freq, 3)

sentence_length_tfidf <- function(docs){

  tf <- sentence_length_bins(docs)

  df <- colSums(tf > 0)
  N <- nrow(tf)

  idf <- log((N + 1) / (df + 1)) + 1

  sweep(tf, 2, idf, "*")
}


sent_tfidf <- sentence_length_tfidf(docs)

round(sent_tfidf, 3)


top_features <- function(mat, doc, k = 10){

  if(!doc %in% rownames(mat)){
    stop(
      paste0(
        "Document '", doc, "' not found. Available docs: ",
        paste(rownames(mat), collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }

  sort(mat[doc, ], decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(k, ncol(mat))]
}


top_features(sent_freq, "isa1")
top_features(sent_tfidf, "isa1")

cosine_sim <- function(mat){

  norm <- sqrt(rowSums(mat^2))

  mat2 <- mat / norm

  mat2 %*% t(mat2)
}


sent_freq_cosine <- cosine_sim(sent_freq)
sent_tfidf_cosine <- cosine_sim(sent_tfidf)

round(sent_freq_cosine, 3)
round(sent_tfidf_cosine, 3)


sentence_features <- list(
  sentence_length_freq  = sent_freq,
  sentence_length_tfidf = sent_tfidf
)

sentence_cosines <- lapply(sentence_features, cosine_sim)




```

```{r readability}
install.packages("quanteda.textstats")
install.packages("quanteda")

library(quanteda)
library(quanteda.textstats)

docs <- c(
  isa1  = "The vision of Isaiah the son of Amoz.",
  isa2  = "And it shall come to pass in the last days.",
  isa40 = "Comfort ye, comfort ye my people."
)

readability_features <- function(docs){

  corp <- corpus(docs)

  r <- textstat_readability(
    corp,
    measure = c(
      "Flesch",
      "Flesch.Kincaid",
      "ARI",
      "Coleman.Liau",
      "SMOG"
    )
  )

  mat <- as.matrix(
    r[, -1]
  )

  rownames(mat) <- names(docs)

  mat
}


read_feats <- readability_features(docs)

round(read_feats, 3)


cosine_sim <- function(mat){

  norm <- sqrt(rowSums(mat^2))
  mat2 <- mat / norm

  mat2 %*% t(mat2)
}


read_cosine <- cosine_sim(read_feats)

round(read_cosine, 3)

top_features <- function(mat, doc, k = 10){

  sort(
    mat[doc, ],
    decreasing = TRUE
  )[1:min(k, ncol(mat))]

}


top_features(read_feats, "isa1")
top_features(read_feats, "isa2")
top_features(read_feats, "isa40")


feature_sets <- list(
  readability = read_feats
)

cosine_scores <- list(
  readability = read_cosine
)









```

```{r other ratios}

docs <- c(
  isa1  = "The vision of Isaiah the son of Amoz.",
  isa2  = "And it shall come to pass in the last days.",
  isa40 = "Comfort ye, comfort ye my people."
)

tokenize_text <- function(text){
  text <- tolower(text)
  text <- gsub("[^a-z ]", " ", text)
  text <- gsub("\\s+", " ", text)
  text <- trimws(text)

  words <- unlist(strsplit(text, " "))
  words[words != ""]
}

lexical_features <- function(docs){

  mat <- matrix(
    0,
    nrow = length(docs),
    ncol = 3,
    dimnames = list(
      names(docs),
      c(
        "type_token_ratio",
        "hapax_ratio",
        "avg_word_length"
      )
    )
  )

  for(i in seq_along(docs)){

    words <- tokenize_text(docs[i])
    N <- length(words)
    tab <- table(words)

    mat[i, "type_token_ratio"] <- length(unique(words)) / N
    mat[i, "hapax_ratio"]      <- sum(tab == 1) / N
    mat[i, "avg_word_length"]  <- mean(nchar(words))
  }

  mat
}

cosine_sim <- function(mat){

  norm <- sqrt(rowSums(mat^2))

  mat2 <- mat / norm

  mat2 %*% t(mat2)
}

top_features <- function(mat, doc, k = 10){

  if(!doc %in% rownames(mat)){
    stop(
      paste0(
        "Document '", doc, "' not found. Available docs: ",
        paste(rownames(mat), collapse = ", ")
      )
    )
  }

  sort(mat[doc, ], decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(k, ncol(mat))]
}

lex <- lexical_features(docs)

round(lex, 3)

top_features(lex, "isa1")
top_features(lex, "isa2")
top_features(lex, "isa40")

lex_cosine <- cosine_sim(lex)

round(lex_cosine, 3)

feature_sets <- list(
  lexical_richness = lex
)

cosine_scores <- list(
  lexical_richness = lex_cosine
)





```
